# Propertize

> Propertize S.r.l. is an Italian vacation rental company managing short-term rentals (affitti brevi) across Sardinia, Milan, and Sicily.

## About
Propertize S.r.l. manages curated vacation properties including villas, apartments, and houses. Based in Milan (Piazza della Repubblica 19), the company focuses on providing authentic local experiences with the philosophy "Beyond Stays — vivi come un local." Properties are published across 50+ international booking platforms with dynamic pricing strategies.

## Destinations
- Golfo Aranci, Sardinia
- Costa Smeralda, Sardinia
- Alghero, Sardinia
- Villasimius, Sardinia
- Nuoro & Barbagia, Sardinia
- Milan, Lombardy

## Property Types
- Ville (Villas)
- Appartamenti (Apartments)
- Case (Houses)
- Villette (Small villas)
- Studi (Studios)

## Services for Guests
- Short-term vacation rentals across Sardinia and Milan
- Equipped kitchens, fast Wi-Fi, quality linens included
- Welcome kit with local products
- Multilingual 24/7 guest assistance
- Gift cards for vacation experiences
- Culinary and outdoor experiences in Sardinia

## Services for Property Owners
- Free property valuation
- Property optimization (professional photos, interior design)
- Bureaucratic management (permits, registrations, taxes)
- Publication on 50+ international booking platforms
- Dynamic pricing strategy
- 24/7 multilingual guest assistance
- Professional cleaning and maintenance

## Cancellation Policy
- 30+ days before arrival: 10% charge
- 29-7 days before: 50% charge
- Less than 7 days: 100% charge

## Payment Methods
- Bank transfer, Mastercard, Visa
